title: Keel Toys SE6710 25cm Keeleco Baby Cozy Koala 100% Recycled. 100% Huggable.
features: Keeleco is the 100% recycled range from Keel Toys. 100% recycled material and filling.
ECO-FRIENDLY - These toys are made and filled with 100% recycled plastic waste.
HUGGLE - Weighted with recycled glass grains, these soft toys have been perfectly designed to cuddle by a new adorable friend.
The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses 59% less energy than virgin polyester.
